description: Wind Power LLC has just purchased a capital asset for their manufacturing operations. Your job is to process this in ERPNext: 1) Create and submit a Purchase Invoice from supplier 'Eagle Hardware' for 1 unit of 'CNC Milling Machine' at a rate of $48,000. 2) ERPNext will auto-create a draft Asset. Find it, set its Location to 'Main Factory', set 'Available-for-use Date' to today's date, and set 'Depreciation Start Date' (in Finance Books) to exactly one month from today. Submit the Asset to generate its depreciation schedule. 3) Finally, create and submit an Asset Movement to transfer the machine from 'Main Factory' to 'Production Floor'. Log into ERPNext at http://localhost:8080 with credentials Administrator / admin.
